hero.question: US forces enter Iran by March 31?
hero.prob_take: The crowd has nearly off-tabled a US military incursion into Iran by year-end, pricing it at 11.5% and essentially saying it won't happen. The real tell is whether you believe the current Middle East escalation cycle has room to spiral into direct US action in the next 90 days, because if it does, this is underpriced by a factor of 2 to 3.

daily_take.headline: Iran War Odds Tank on Quiet Day. Smart Money Disagrees.
daily_take.deck: US forces entering Iran dropped half a point to 11.5% on light headlines, but $29M in volume tells a different story. The market is pricing this like a low-probability tail risk when geopolitical momentum suggests otherwise. Contrarian bettors should be hunting for mispriced upside before the next escalation cycle shifts perception.
